title: Install or update approved software
body:
# Install or update approved software

All company-approved software is available through the software portal (not from external websites):

1. Open the software portal from your desktop or start menu.
2. Search for the application by name.
3. Click **Install** — most installs complete silently in the background.
4. For updates, the portal automatically pushes critical updates; optional updates can be triggered manually from the **Updates** tab.

If an application you need isn't listed in the portal, submit a software request ticket describing the business need — unapproved software cannot be installed directly due to security policy.
